solutions.title: Solution
solutions.content:
fun main
()
{
val k
=
readLine
()!!.
toInt
()
repeat
(
k
)
{
val s
=
readLine
()!!
val t
=
readLine
()!!
println
(
if
(
solve
(
s
,
t
))
"YES"
else
"NO"
)
}
}
private
fun solve
(
s
:
String
,
t
:
String
):
Boolean
{
var
i
=
0
var
j
=
0
while
(
i
<
s
.
length
&&
j
<
t
.
length
)
{
when
(
s
[
i
])
{
t
[
j
]
->
{}
'+'
->
return
false
else
->
{
// '-' -> '+'
i
++
if
(
i
>=
s
.
length
||
s
[
i
]
!=
'-'
)
return
false
}
}
i
++
j
++
}
return
i
==
s
.
length
&&
j
==
t
.
length
}
